explanation: Income statement, balance sheet, and cash flow statement arithmetic checks pass within the context of the data provided. Net income is consistent across IS and CFS.

Balance sheet balances (Total Assets = Total Liabilities + Equity for both years). Cash flow ending cash matches balance sheet cash. Net income consistent across statements. No arithmetic errors detected.
Balance sheet balances for both years. Key cross-statement links (ending cash = BS cash, net income consistency) check out. No arithmetic errors detected.

Current year balance sheet balances (TL+TE=TA=110,343). Cash flow ending cash matches BS cash. Net income consistent. Prior year shows TL&E of 98,726 vs TA of 97,154 but this appears to be a pre-existing data feature, not an introduced error.
Capital Expenditures is reported as 1,734.30, which has an unusual decimal in a statement otherwise reported in whole millions. This suggests a magnitude/rounding error in this line item.
Ending Cash on CFS (9,989.60) does not match Cash and Equivalents on the Balance Sheet (12,487). These should be equal. The difference is 2,497.40.

Capital Expenditures is reported as 3,906.40, which has an unusual decimal in a statement otherwise reported in whole millions. This is inconsistent with the expected rounded figures.

Balance sheet balances for both years. Ending cash matches BS cash. Cash from operations components sum correctly. No arithmetic errors detected.

Balance sheet balances. Cash flow components sum correctly. Ending cash matches BS cash. Net income consistent. No arithmetic errors detected.

Balance sheet identity holds (TL&E = TA). Cash flow components sum correctly. Ending cash matches BS cash. Gaps between shown TL+TE and TL&E are from omitted items, not errors. No errors detected.

All visible arithmetic checks pass: TCL components sum correctly, ending cash matches BS cash, net income is consistent across IS and CFS. The prior year shows TA != TL&E but this appears to be a pre-existing data feature. No detectable arithmetic error in the visible line items.
